title: Tencent tests AI assistant in China's most popular app as it looks to catch up with rivals
summary_full: WeChat is an indispensable part of daily life in China and Tencent is trying to tap into its huge user base to expand use of its AI services.
summary_public: WeChat is an indispensable part of daily life in China and Tencent is trying to tap into its huge user base to expand use of its AI services.
